name: restore-heights-rect
description: write back the heights snapshotted by capture-heights-rect, then clear the buffer
lua: if __mcpHB == nil then return "[ERR] nothing captured -- run capture-heights-rect first" end local terr = g_terrainNode if terr == nil or not entityExists(terr) then local r = getRootNode() for i = 0, getNumOfChildren(r) - 1 do local c = getChildAt(r, i) if getName(c) == "terrain" then terr = c break end end end local b = __mcpHB local i = 1 for x = b.x1, b.x2, b.step do for z = b.z1, b.z2, b.step do setTerrainHeightAtWorldPos(terr, x, 0, z, b.h[i]) i = i + 1 end end __mcpHB = nil return "restored " .. (i - 1) .. " heights"
